| [1](BBE.md#v1) | These are the sons of Israel: Reuben, Simeon, Levi and Judah, Issachar and Zebulun; | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Dan, Joseph and Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad and Asher. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | The sons of Judah: Er and Onan and Shelah; these three were his sons by Bathshua, the Canaanite woman. And Er, Judah's oldest son, did evil in the eyes of the Lord; and he put him to death. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | And Tamar, his daughter-in-law, had Perez and Zerah by him. All the sons of Judah were five. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | The sons of Perez: Hezron and Hamul. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | And the sons of Zerah: Zimri and Ethan and Heman and Calcol and Dara; five of them. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | And the sons of Carmi: Achan, the troubler of Israel, who did wrong about the cursed thing. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | And the son of Ethan: Azariah. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | And the sons of Hezron, the offspring of his body: Jerahmeel and Ram and Chelubai. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | And Ram was the father of Amminadab; and Amminadab was the father of Nahshon, chief of the children of Judah; | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | And Nahshon was the father of Salma, and Salma was the father of Boaz, | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | And Boaz was the father of Obed, and Obed was the father of Jesse, | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | And Jesse was the father of Eliab, his oldest son, and Abinadab, the second, and Shimea, the third, | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | Nethanel, the fourth, Raddai, the fifth, | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | Ozem, the sixth, David, the seventh; | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | And their sisters were Zeruiah and Abigail. And Zeruiah had three sons: Abishai and Joab and Asahel. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | And Abigail was the mother of Amasa; and the father of Amasa was Jether the Ishmaelite. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | And Caleb, the son of Hezron, had children by Azubah his wife, the daughter of Jerioth; and these were her sons: Jesher and Shobab and Ardon. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | And after the death of Azubah, Caleb took as his wife Ephrath, who was the mother of Hur. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | And Hur was the father of Uri; and Uri was the father of Bezalel. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | And after that, Hezron had connection with the daughter of Machir, the father of Gilead, whom he took as his wife when he was sixty years old; and she had Segub by him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | And Segub was the father of Jair, who had twenty-three towns in the land of Gilead. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | And Geshur and Aram took the tent-towns of Jair from them, with Kenath and the small places round it, even sixty towns. All these were the sons of Machir, the father of Gilead. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | And after the death of Hezron, Caleb had connection with Ephrath, his father Hezron's wife, and she gave birth to his son Asshur, the father of Tekoa. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | And the sons of Jerahmeel, the oldest son of Hezron, were Ram, the oldest, and Bunah and Oren and Ozem and Ahijah. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | And Jerahmeel had another wife, whose name was Atarah: she was the mother of Onam. | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | And the sons of Ram, the oldest son of Jerahmeel, were Maaz and Jamin and Eker. | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | And the sons of Onam were Shammai and Jada; and the sons of Shammai: Nadab and Abishur. | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
| [29](BBE.md#v29) | And the name of Abishur's wife was Abihail; and she had Ahban and Molid by him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v29) · [KJV](KJV.md#v29) · [ASV](ASV.md#v29) |
| [30](BBE.md#v30) | And the sons of Nadab: Seled and Appaim; but Seled came to his end without sons. | [WEB](WEB.md#v30) · [KJV](KJV.md#v30) · [ASV](ASV.md#v30) |
| [31](BBE.md#v31) | And the sons of Appaim: Ishi. And the sons of Ishi: Sheshan. And the sons of Sheshan: Ahlai. | [WEB](WEB.md#v31) · [KJV](KJV.md#v31) · [ASV](ASV.md#v31) |
| [32](BBE.md#v32) | And the sons of Jada, the brother of Shammai: Jether and Jonathan; and Jether came to his end without sons. | [WEB](WEB.md#v32) · [KJV](KJV.md#v32) · [ASV](ASV.md#v32) |
| [33](BBE.md#v33) | And the sons of Jonathan: Peleth and Zaza. These were the sons of Jerahmeel. | [WEB](WEB.md#v33) · [KJV](KJV.md#v33) · [ASV](ASV.md#v33) |
| [34](BBE.md#v34) | Now Sheshan had no sons, but only daughters. And Sheshan had an Egyptian servant, whose name was Jarha. | [WEB](WEB.md#v34) · [KJV](KJV.md#v34) · [ASV](ASV.md#v34) |
| [35](BBE.md#v35) | And Sheshan gave his daughter to Jarha, his servant, as a wife; and she had Attai by him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v35) · [KJV](KJV.md#v35) · [ASV](ASV.md#v35) |
| [36](BBE.md#v36) | And Attai was the father of Nathan, and Nathan was the father of Zabad, | [WEB](WEB.md#v36) · [KJV](KJV.md#v36) · [ASV](ASV.md#v36) |
| [37](BBE.md#v37) | And Zabad was the father of Ephlal, and Ephlal was the father of Obed, | [WEB](WEB.md#v37) · [KJV](KJV.md#v37) · [ASV](ASV.md#v37) |
| [38](BBE.md#v38) | And Obed was the father of Jehu, and Jehu was the father of Azariah, | [WEB](WEB.md#v38) · [KJV](KJV.md#v38) · [ASV](ASV.md#v38) |
| [39](BBE.md#v39) | And Azariah was the father of Helez, and Helez was the father of Eleasah, | [WEB](WEB.md#v39) · [KJV](KJV.md#v39) · [ASV](ASV.md#v39) |
| [40](BBE.md#v40) | And Eleasah was the father of Sismai, and Sismai was the father of Shallum, | [WEB](WEB.md#v40) · [KJV](KJV.md#v40) · [ASV](ASV.md#v40) |
| [41](BBE.md#v41) | And Shallum was the father of Jekamiah, and Jekamiah was the father of Elishama. | [WEB](WEB.md#v41) · [KJV](KJV.md#v41) · [ASV](ASV.md#v41) |
| [42](BBE.md#v42) | And the sons of Caleb, the brother of Jerahmeel, were Mareshah, his oldest son, who was the father of Ziph and Hebron. | [WEB](WEB.md#v42) · [KJV](KJV.md#v42) · [ASV](ASV.md#v42) |
| [43](BBE.md#v43) | And the sons of Hebron: Korah and Tappuah and Rekem and Shema. | [WEB](WEB.md#v43) · [KJV](KJV.md#v43) · [ASV](ASV.md#v43) |
| [44](BBE.md#v44) | And Shema was the father of Raham, the father of Jorkeam, and Rekem was the father of Shammai. | [WEB](WEB.md#v44) · [KJV](KJV.md#v44) · [ASV](ASV.md#v44) |
| [45](BBE.md#v45) | And the son of Shammai was Maon; and Maon was the father of Beth-zur. | [WEB](WEB.md#v45) · [KJV](KJV.md#v45) · [ASV](ASV.md#v45) |
| [46](BBE.md#v46) | And Ephah, Caleb's servant-wife, had Haran and Moza and Gazez; and Haran was the father of Gazez. | [WEB](WEB.md#v46) · [KJV](KJV.md#v46) · [ASV](ASV.md#v46) |
| [47](BBE.md#v47) | And the sons of Jahdai: Regem and Jotham and Geshan and Pelet and Ephah and Shaaph. | [WEB](WEB.md#v47) · [KJV](KJV.md#v47) · [ASV](ASV.md#v47) |
| [48](BBE.md#v48) | Maacah, Caleb's servant-wife, was the mother of Sheber and Tirhanah, | [WEB](WEB.md#v48) · [KJV](KJV.md#v48) · [ASV](ASV.md#v48) |
| [49](BBE.md#v49) | And Shaaph, the father of Madmannah, Sheva, the father of Machbena and the father of Gibea; and Caleb's daughter was Achsah. These were the sons of Caleb. | [WEB](WEB.md#v49) · [KJV](KJV.md#v49) · [ASV](ASV.md#v49) |
| [50](BBE.md#v50) | The sons of Hur, the oldest son of Ephrathah; Shobal, the father of Kiriath-jearim, | [WEB](WEB.md#v50) · [KJV](KJV.md#v50) · [ASV](ASV.md#v50) |
| [51](BBE.md#v51) | Salma, the father of Beth-lehem, Hareph, the father of Beth-gader. | [WEB](WEB.md#v51) · [KJV](KJV.md#v51) · [ASV](ASV.md#v51) |
| [52](BBE.md#v52) | And Shobal, the father of Kiriath-jearim, had sons: Haroeh, half of the Manahathites. | [WEB](WEB.md#v52) · [KJV](KJV.md#v52) · [ASV](ASV.md#v52) |
| [53](BBE.md#v53) | And the families of Kiriath-jearim: the Ithrites and the Puthites and the Shumathites and the Mishraites; from them came the Zorathites and the Eshtaolites. | [WEB](WEB.md#v53) · [KJV](KJV.md#v53) · [ASV](ASV.md#v53) |
| [54](BBE.md#v54) | The sons of Salma: Beth-lehem and the Netophathites, Atroth-beth-Joab and half of the Manahathites, the Zorites. | [WEB](WEB.md#v54) · [KJV](KJV.md#v54) · [ASV](ASV.md#v54) |
| [55](BBE.md#v55) | And the families of scribes who were living at Jabez: the Tirathites, the Shimeathites, the Sucathites. These are the Kenites, the offspring of Hammath, the father of the family of Rechab. | [WEB](WEB.md#v55) · [KJV](KJV.md#v55) · [ASV](ASV.md#v55) |
